positive: Stylized, highly detailed central composition of interconnected forest fauna and botanical elements. Main subjects include stylized deer silhouettes, large crescent moons, blooming mandalas, and interwoven fern fronds, all rendered in a continuous, repeating pattern format. The style is neo-tribal etching meeting delicate linework, with high contrast black line art on a creamy off-white background. The composition must feature strong, symmetrical silhouettes and clean, scalable details suitable for apparel printing. Use dynamic negative space to emphasize the complexity and elegance of the natural forms. Full coverage, repeating tile pattern.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, artifact, noisy, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, gradient, flat colors, photo, sketch, messy, writing
